message.value: @concat('Could not verify file size for file: ', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_name, '. File details:- BronzeFile: ', string(activity('GetBronzeFileSize').output.size), ' bytes, Lookup File: ', string(activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_size_bytes), ' bytes')

body.value:
{
       "upload_id": "@{activity('readServiceBusMessage').output.upload_id}",
       "bank_id": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.bank_id}",
       "status": "verification_failed",
       "expected_size_bytes": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_size_bytes}",
    "actual_size_bytes": "@{activity('GetBronzeFileSize').output.size}",
       "source_blob_path": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.blob_path}",
       "bronze_blob_path": "@{concat('bronze/training/', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.bank_id, '/', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '/', activity('readServiceBusMessage').output.upload_id, '.', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_format)}",
       "file_format": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_format}",
       "row_count": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.row_count}",
       "column_count": "@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.column_count}",
       "timestamp": "@{utcNow()}",
       "status": "File size verification failed - file may be corrupted during copy"
     }

text.value:
UPDATE upload_metadata
SET 
   bronze_status = 'verification_failed',
   status = 'bronze_verification_failed',
   error_message = @{concat('File size verification failed. Expected: ', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_size_bytes, '. Actual: ', string(activity('GetBronzeFileSize').output.size), ' bytes.')},
      updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  WHERE upload_id = '@{activity('readServiceBusMessage').output.upload_id}'
  AND is_deleted = 'false'

activities.description: Update upload_metadata table with bronze layer information
activities.name: updateBronzeMetadata

text.value:
UPDATE training_uploads
     SET 
         bronze_blob_path = '@{concat('bronze/training/', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.data_source_id, '/', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '/', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.id, '.', activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.file_format)}',
         bronze_row_count = @{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.row_count},
         bronze_file_size_bytes = @{activity('GetBronzeFileSize').output.size},
         bronze_checksum_sha256 = '',
         bronze_status = 'verified',
         bronze_verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
         status = 'bronze_ingested',
         updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
     WHERE upload_id = '@{activity('lookupMetadata').output.firstRow.id}'
     AND is_deleted = 'false'

query.value: @concat('SELECT data_source_id, status, file_name, file_format, file_size_bytes, raw_file_path, file_metadata, record_count FROM training_uploads WHERE id = ''', activity('readServiceBusMessage').output.training_upload_id, ''' AND status = ''ingesting''')
